prose.en: Identify potential accessibility problems to alternate processing sites in the event of an area-wide disruption or disaster and outlines explicit mitigation actions.

guidance.en: Area-wide disruptions refer to those types of disruptions that are broad in geographic scope with such determinations made by organizations based on organizational assessments of risk.

prose.en: potential accessibility problems to alternate processing sites in the event of an area-wide disruption or disaster are identified;
explicit mitigation actions to address identified accessibility problems are outlined.

objects.en: Organizational personnel with contingency plan alternate processing site responsibilities
organizational personnel with system recovery responsibilities
organizational personnel with information security responsibilities
